finance_snapshot.total_before_tax: Starting MSRP about $58,300 before tax, destination, and dealer fees.
finance_snapshot.apr: Toyota routes current finance offers through ZIP-based Local Specials.
finance_snapshot.finance_payment: Use Toyota Local Specials or a dealer quote.
finance_snapshot.finance_down_payment: Varies by ZIP, trim, and credit profile.
finance_snapshot.lease_payment: Confirm with a dealer; performance-car lease support can be limited.
finance_snapshot.due_at_signing: Varies by dealer and market support.
finance_snapshot.incentives: Toyota does not expose a national GR Supra monthly offer in public page HTML; local-specials flow is required.
finance_snapshot.warranty: Toyota New Vehicle Limited Warranty is 36 months/36,000 miles, with powertrain coverage at 60 months/60,000 miles. New Toyotas also include ToyotaCare no-cost maintenance and 24-hour roadside assistance. Hybrid and plug-in models use Toyota's electrified-vehicle warranty program, including the 10-year/150,000-mile hybrid battery coverage called out on Toyota's official electrified warranty page.
finance_snapshot.best_for: Buyers prioritizing sports-car performance over monthly-cost efficiency.
finance_snapshot.financial_strengths: Toyota dealer network helps with support relative to niche performance alternatives.
finance_snapshot.financial_concerns: Higher MSRP and potentially limited incentives make this one of the least payment-friendly Toyota entries.
finance_snapshot.notes: Snapshot uses Toyota US pricing on March 25, 2026.

image_strategy.note: Dataset stores one canonical local image per vehicle.
